TCA-IRR

    AI Agent Management

    Monitor, configure, and test the multi-agent AI system powering all analyses.

    Help
    Active Provider
    Fallback Provider
    Providers Configured
    Auto-Model Selection
    The AI agent always uses the latest stable model version for each provider. Models are updated server-side without any code changes needed. Current: OpenAI gpt-4o → fallback Gemini gemini-1.5-pro.
    OpenAI
    Primary
    GPT-4o — highest analysis quality, best for structured JSON output
    Model:gpt-4o
    Status: Missing OPENAI_API_KEY
    Set OPENAI_API_KEY in Azure App Service → Configuration → Application settings.
    Google Gemini
    Fallback
    Gemini 1.5 Pro — high-quality fallback when OpenAI is unavailable
    Model:gemini-1.5-pro
    Status: Missing GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY
    Set GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY in Azure App Service → Configuration → Application settings.
    How to add or update API keys
    1. Go to Azure Portal → App Services → tca-irr
    2. Select Configuration → Application settings
    3. Click + New application setting
    4. Add OPENAI_API_KEY and/or GOOGLE_AI_API_KEY with your key values
    5. Click Save and then Restart the app
    Full setup guide
